name: Run a One-Click Toxic Backlink Audit and Disavow File Generator with DataForSEO

expect.name: convert
expect.label: Convert the File to Google Docs Document

mapper.content:
Your disavow file for {{domain}} has been generated: See your disavow file

Please review it before uploading to Google Search Console.

contents.text: You have too many disavow links. Please change the request parameters to generate a valid disavow file.
